name: Knightfaul

sheet.name: Knightfaul
sheet.background_story:
On the night of his betrothal, his bride, Princess of the Verdant, was poisoned by the dart of a hired assassin.  

Heartbroken and rageful, he forsook his code of chivalry and donned his beloved's ceremonial armor, vowing not to rest until she was avenged. After months of relentless pursuit, word reached his ears of the assassin's appearance at the edge of the Child's Nest. The end of a long vendetta draws near...

description:
